items.caption: A graphic design with a yellow background. on the left side, there is a stylized depiction of a yellow folder with a lock icon on it, suggesting the concept of encryption. the folder is placed in front of a blurred background that appears to be a computer screen with lines of code, indicating a software development context. on the right side, there is a smaller icon of the same yellow folder with a lock, accompanied by the text "encrypted.dev" in a sans-serif font. below the icons, there is a tagline in a smaller font that reads, "this is a software development framework for web/mobile application developers focused on user data privacy." the overall style of the image is modern and clean, with a clear emphasis on the theme of secure software development.
